detector.inline: profile.code_domains.some(d => ['backend','api','rest','graphql'].includes(d)) || profile.repo_signals.some(s => /\b(openapi|graphql|grpc|rpc|api (endpoint|route|controller|handler)|rest(ful)? (api|endpoint)|http (route|handler|endpoint)|route (handler|definition)|controller (action|method)|api middleware|request (validation|handler))\b|接口(路由|设计)|后端接口|路由(处理|定义)/i.test(s)) ? 0.84 : 0
